name: getTaggedEntities
description:
**Requires an Enterprise plan.** Tagging is only available on Postman Enterprise plans. This tool returns a 404 error on Free, Basic, and Professional accounts.

Gets Postman elements (entities) by a given tag. Tags enable you to organize and search workspaces, APIs, and collections that contain shared tags.

slug.description: The tag's ID within a team or individual (non-team) user scope.

limit.description: The maximum number of tagged elements to return in a single call.

direction.description: The ascending (`asc`) or descending (`desc`) order to sort the results by, based on the time of the entity's tagging.

cursor.description: The cursor to get the next set of results in the paginated response. If you pass an invalid value, the API only returns the first set of results.

entityType.description: Filter results for the given entity type.
